name: Wang Zhi
page_title: Wang Zhi  [Han] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes:
Wang Zhi was younger brother to regular attendant Wang Fu. Cai Yong had been banished Shoufang in AD 178, but soon to the capital under a general amnesty. However, Wang Zhi, then Grand Administrator of Wuyuan, reported that Cai Yong had insulted the court. Upon hearing this Cai Yong fled to the Yangzi and the sea where he remained in exile for twelve years. (1) (2)

(1): Though Wang Fu and his clan fell from power in AD 179 Cai Yong probably wasn’t willing to risk further slander. It wasn’t until Dong Zhuo threatened him in AD 189 that he finally returned.

(2): To Establish Peace I, ZZTJ: 59, de Crespigny, Rafe

full_text:
Wang Zhi
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Zhi. Younger brother of Wang Fu. Cai Yong fled to Wuyuan after being slandered by Wang Zhi. Wang Zhi was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.

However, Wang Zhi, then Grand Administrator of Wuyuan, reported that Cai Yong had insulted the court. Upon hearing this Cai Yong fled to the Yangzi and the sea where he remained in exile for twelve years. (1) (2)
(1): Though Wang Fu and his clan fell from power in AD 179 Cai Yong probably wasn’t willing to risk further slander. It wasn’t until Dong Zhuo threatened him in AD 189 that he finally returned.
(2):To Establish Peace I, ZZTJ: 59, de Crespigny, Rafe
